name: Body Mass Index (BMI)
description: This test case evaluates retrieval of Body Mass Index observations from patient records. It tests the system's ability to find BMI values that may be directly recorded as observations or calculated from height and weight measurements, which is essential for the eMERGE-IV BMI phenotyping algorithm that requires minimum 3 BMI measures per patient.
prompt: Find all BMI measurements for patients, including both calculated values and recorded observations
